subcodes.first_line: The splendor that shineth forth and gleameth resplendent from the horizon of the heaven of the loving-kindness of the Lord of the Ancient Days and the Most Great Name be upon thee, O Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء المشرق اللائح من افق سماء عنایه مالک القدم و الاسم الاعظم علیک یا اسم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
